summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Assam Co-op Connect (FastAPI + Expo Router). Backend: 25/25 pytest tests PASSED covering auth (admin/manager/agent login, /auth/me, invalid creds), members CRUD with role guard (agent 403), accounts (RD open + balance), loans (EMI math 60000@12%/12mo => ₹5330.93 ✅, agent 403 on approve, admin approve flips status, double-approve returns 400, reject flow), transactions (Deposit increments account balance, EMI increments loan.paid, agent can record collection), notices (admin+manager 200, agent 403), rules (Assam Co-op Act fields), dashboard aggregates. Frontend (mobile 390x844): Login screen renders, demo-admin prefill works, admin login -> dashboard with greeting + balance card + recent txns, quick-action navigation to Members, Add Member FAB -> save -> new member appears in list & search, Loans screen -> New Loan FAB -> member picker + amount/rate/tenure/purpose inputs -> EMI preview updates correctly to ₹5331 / ₹3971 interest / ₹63971 payable, submit returns to Loans list, approve flow tapped with confirm dialog auto-accepted, More menu navigates to Deposits, Collections, Notices, Rules, Profile, and Logout returns to login screen.

minor.issue: Passlib trapped AttributeError: module 'bcrypt' has no attribute '__about__' on every startup. Harmless (hashing still works) but noisy. Pin bcrypt<4 or upgrade passlib.
No auth/identity recorded on approval (no approved_by field). Minor — audit trail incomplete for a co-operative app.

logger.info called inside seed() but logger is defined ~50 lines below the function in module order. Works at runtime because module is fully loaded before startup event fires, but is a footgun for future edits.

issues: Console warning: "shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow" (RN 0.79+ on web).
Console warning: props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.

react_native_issues.issue: Expo doctor reports outdated packages: expo@54.0.34 (expected ~54.0.35), expo-font@14.0.11 (expected ~14.0.12), expo-router@6.0.23 (expected ~6.0.24). Run `npx expo install --check` to align. Reference: /var/log/supervisor/expo.err.log

action_items: (Optional) Pin `bcrypt<4` in backend/requirements.txt or upgrade passlib to silence the bcrypt version warning.
(Optional) Record `approved_by` user id/name on loan approve & reject for audit trail (the Assam Co-op Act values audit-friendliness).
(Optional) Move the `logger = logging.getLogger(...)` definition above the `@app.on_event('startup')` seed handler to avoid potential refactor breakage.
(Optional) Run `npx expo install --check` to bump expo / expo-font / expo-router to the recommended patch versions.
(Cosmetic) Replace `shadowColor/shadowOffset/...` with `boxShadow` and pass `pointerEvents` via style to silence RN-web deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: All endpoints prefixed /api, all responses strip Mongo _id, Pydantic models validate input, role gating via require_roles dependency.
Good: testIDs present on every interactive element on every screen.
Good: EMI helper math verified against standard amortisation formula (P*r*(1+r)^n/((1+r)^n-1)).
Minor: backend/server.py is ~575 lines; close to but under the 700-line split threshold. Acceptable for now.
Minor: loan approve/reject does not stamp approver identity (only approved_on).

success_rate.frontend: 100% of critical flows (login, dashboard, members CRUD, loan apply + EMI preview + approve, more menu nav, notices add modal not re-exercised in second run, profile logout)

seed_data_creation: Created via tests: 1 TEST_ member, 1 RD account, 2 loans (1 approved/1 rejected), several TEST_ transactions and 2 TEST_ notices. All prefixed TEST_ for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend env var for public URL is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (NOT EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_coop_api.py. Demo accounts seeded automatically on startup. For UI: prefer [data-testid='quick-action-members'] / 'quick-action-loans' to navigate from dashboard — bottom tab clicks via text='Members' can collide with the dashboard Quick-Action card of the same label.
rca_of_issue: No production bugs found. Initial pytest failure on test_loan_emi_calc was a wrong expected value in the test (5327.50 instead of correct 5330.93). Recomputed with formula and fixed the assertion. Backend EMI calc is correct.
